content:
Introducing Code Visualiser, a tool that turns JavaScript execution into something you can actually see.

2 min read
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Photo by Christopher Gower on UnsplashEvery developer hits this wall. You write a recursive function, it returns the wrong answer, and you’re left staring at the code adding console.log after console.log, trying to reconstruct in your head the tangle of calls the machine ran in milliseconds. Recursion and dynamic programming are hard not because the ideas are complicated, but because the execution is invisible.
Code Visualiser makes it visible.
See how your code actually runs
Paste in a JavaScript function, hit run, and watch the call tree unfold node by node. Every recursive call becomes a branch. Every return value flows back up. Instead of imagining the stack, you see it — the exact shape of the computation, laid out in front of you.
Then step through it, call by call:
Walk the execution forward and back, at your own pace
Inspect variables at every step, so you know exactly what state the program was in
Set breakpoints and jump straight to the moment things get interesting
It’s the mental model you’ve always built by hand — the boxes, the arrows, the “okay so this call returns 3, which means…” — except the tool draws it for you, correctly, every time.
Perfect for learning (and teaching)
If you’re wrestling with recursion, backtracking, or DP for the first time, there’s no faster way to build intuition than watching a real call tree grow. And if you’re teaching, it beats a whiteboard: your diagram is guaranteed to match what the code truly does.
Runs entirely in your browser — nothing uploaded
Your code runs in a sandboxed Web Worker right on your machine. Nothing is sent to a server, nothing is stored, nothing leaves the tab.
There’s even a built-in sketch whiteboard for the diagrams you’d otherwise scribble on paper.
Try it
No sign-up, no install, no upload. Just open it and paste some code. Provide your valuable feedback to improve it:
👉 https://code-visualiser-vert.vercel.app/
Stop tracing recursion in your head. Watch it run.
